# NOTE (docs/DOOMED_GATE_PLAN.md M1 fixtures): the real BigbearAI posting text at
# generation time (2026-07-02, tracker row ATS 96%, owner note "гибрид в
# америке") is not recoverable from this dev machine — the tracker's saved URL
# is a LinkedIn "posts/..." share link (a social post *about* the opening, not
# the job listing itself), and re-fetching it live returns only the ~3KB post
# blurb with no location/work-mode details (verified live 2026-07-06).
# The real job's location/work-mode is documented in
# docs/DOOMED_GATE_PLAN.md ("гибрид в McLean, Virginia") and confirmed by the
# owner's own tracker note. This fixture reconstructs a representative posting
# using the real, publicly-known facts (company, title, McLean VA HQ, hybrid
# policy) to exercise the foreign_onsite_hybrid HARD rule end-to-end.
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/jay-sales_senior-front-end-angular-engineer-in-mclean-share-7478194195011371008-9ezx

Senior Front End Angular Engineer
BigBear.ai
McLean, Virginia — Hybrid

About BigBear.ai
BigBear.ai delivers AI-powered decision intelligence solutions for national security, digital identity, and supply chain management customers. Headquartered in McLean, Virginia, we help our customers turn data into actionable insight.

The Role
We are looking for a Senior Front End Angular Engineer to join our product engineering team at our McLean, Virginia headquarters. This is a hybrid role requiring on-site presence at the McLean office several days a week to collaborate closely with our design and backend teams.

What You'll Do
Build and maintain complex Angular applications for our digital-twin simulation platform.
Collaborate on-site with cross-functional teams in McLean, VA.
Own frontend architecture decisions for real-time 3D visualization features.

Requirements
5+ years of production Angular experience.
Strong TypeScript, RxJS and NgRx skills.
Must be able to work on-site at our McLean, Virginia office on a hybrid schedule.
Experience with WebGL/Three.js is a plus.
